goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'leicester' and should 'arrive by 09:30'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should go to leicester and should arrive by 09:30
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get price and travel time
